intro: The cryptocurrency sector was the primary target of a concentrated wave of attacks from April 12 to April 21, 2026, detailed across 15 articles. The activity, which included 12 high and 3 critical severity incidents, also heavily impacted decentralized finance (DeFi), financial-services, telecommunications, and venture capital. The threat actors FakeWallet, Lazarus Group, and Omnistealer were prominently observed, with exploitation of the critical vulnerability CVE-2023-4863 noted. Geographically, the campaigns affected organizations and users in the United states, Canada, Europe, Kyrgyzstan, and North america.
